title: Experimental data supporting keratin-TMAO dressing study in diabetic wound healing
author: Rybka, Mateusz
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains experimental data supporting the publication “Keratin-TMAO dressing accelerates full-thickness skin wound healing in diabetic rats via M2-macrophage polarization and the activation of PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling pathway”. 
 The dataset includes cell viability data (MTS), cell migration analyses (scratch assay), quantitative molecular analyses (qPCR and Western blot densitometry), in vivo wound healing measurements, and immunohistochemistry. 
 Funding: National Science Centre, Poland, PRELUDIUM 23, project no. UMO-2024/53/N/NZ4/03697.
steps_raw:
